_comment: Single source of truth for indicator statuses. status: 0=未觸發 not triggered, 1=出現跡象 signs, 2=已觸發 triggered. class: normal | evac | final (final implies evac). Only pipeline/apply.py may change status/note/sources/history.

indicators.name_zh: 對台當面兵力異常集結
indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 公開報導與西方國防部門評估未見對台當面兵力異常集結。
indicators.note_en: No open-source reporting of unusual force concentration opposite Taiwan as of July 2026.
queries: PLA troop buildup Fujian coast opposite Taiwan
China military concentration Taiwan strait satellite imagery
解放軍 台海 兵力集結

indicators.note_zh: 2025/12 共軍舉行迄今最大規模環台實彈演習，模擬封鎖及打擊港口與能源設施，演習頻率高於常態。
indicators.note_en: PLA held its largest-ever drills encircling Taiwan in Dec 2025, simulating blockade and strikes on ports and energy facilities; exercise tempo remains elevated.
queries: PLA live-fire exercise Taiwan strait
China military drills encircling Taiwan
共軍 環台 軍演 實彈

indicators.name_zh: 醫療後勤動員（血漿儲備）
indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 未見軍事性血液儲備或醫療後勤動員訊號；現有報導僅涉民用長期血荒。
indicators.note_en: No sign of military blood-supply or medical logistics mobilization as of July 2026; available reporting covers only a chronic civilian shortage.
queries: China blood supplies military hospitals mobilization
PLA medical logistics wartime preparation
解放軍 血漿 戰備 醫療動員

indicators.note_zh: 滾裝船參與共軍演訓自 2019 年起已屬常態背景；2026/07 未見大規模徵用或異常集結跡象。
indicators.note_en: RO-RO ferries joining PLA exercises since 2019 is a known baseline; no signs of mass requisition or unusual assembly as of July 2026.
queries: China civilian ferries requisition military exercise
RO-RO ferry PLA amphibious mobilization
滾裝船 徵用 渡海 演練

indicators.name_zh: 各國縮減駐台使館規模
indicators.note_zh: 美國全球性使館裁員屬行政改革，與台海風險無關；2026/07 未見各國縮減駐台機構規模。
indicators.note_en: US global embassy staff cuts stem from an administrative overhaul, not Taiwan risk; no drawdown of missions in Taipei observed as of July 2026.
queries: embassy drawdown Taipei staff reduction
AIT American Institute Taiwan staff drawdown
駐台 使館 縮編 撤離

indicators.name_zh: 撤離外交官眷屬、敦促公民離境
indicators.name_en: Dependents withdrawn; citizens urged to leave
indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 未見各國撤離駐台外交官眷屬或敦促公民離台；相關報導均涉他國情勢。
indicators.note_en: No withdrawals of diplomatic dependents from Taiwan or calls for citizens to leave as of July 2026; cited departures concern other countries.
queries: State Department orders departure family members Taiwan
citizens urged to leave Taiwan embassy dependents
撤離 眷屬 敦促 公民 離台

indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 無任何國家關閉駐台使館或代表處。
indicators.note_en: No embassies or representative offices in Taipei have closed as of July 2026.
queries: embassy closes Taipei operations suspended
diplomatic mission Taiwan evacuation closure
關閉 代表處 駐台

indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 公開報導未見外商撤離駐台人員、航空公司停飛或戰爭險費率異常。
indicators.note_en: No public reports of corporate personnel withdrawals, airline suspensions, or war-risk premium spikes as of July 2026.
queries: airlines suspend Taiwan flights war risk
war risk insurance premiums Taiwan strait shipping
外商 撤離 台灣 停飛

indicators.name_zh: 美方情報體系公開警告
indicators.note_zh: 美情報體系公開警告：習近平要求共軍 2027 年前具備犯台能力；DIA 不預期今年全面犯台，惟離島威脅或升高。
indicators.note_en: US intel: Xi ordered PLA readiness by 2027; DIA does not expect a full invasion this year but flags possible rising threats to Taiwan's outlying islands.
queries: US intelligence warning China Taiwan invasion timeline
CIA DNI testimony China Taiwan attack
美國 情報 警告 台海

indicators.note_zh: 美國務院對台旅遊警示未達「勿前往」等級；2026/07 未見異常變化。
indicators.note_en: US State Department travel advisory for Taiwan remains below 'Do Not Travel'; no unusual change as of July 2026.
queries: State Department travel advisory Taiwan level
do not travel advisory Taiwan
旅遊警示 台灣 勿前往

indicators.note_zh: 美國防長公開稱中國對台威脅「迫近」；台方指攻擊預警時間縮短。尚無國家元首點名式警告。
indicators.note_en: US defense secretary called China's threat to Taiwan 'imminent'; Taiwan says attack warning time is shortening. No head-of-state warning by name yet.
queries: president warns China will invade Taiwan
White House warning imminent Taiwan attack
總統 警告 中國 侵台

history.note_zh: 美國防長公開稱中國對台威脅「迫近」；台方指攻擊預警時間縮短。尚無國家元首點名式警告。

indicators.name_zh: 戰略物資異常囤積（糧食、能源、金屬）
indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 公開資料未見糧食、能源或金屬進口異常囤積。
indicators.note_en: No abnormal stockpiling of grain, energy, or metals visible in open-source data as of July 2026.
queries: China strategic stockpiling grain oil reserves surge
China sanctions proofing gold de-dollarization
中國 戰略 儲備 囤積

indicators.name_zh: 對台網攻與認知作戰激增
indicators.note_zh: 對台認知作戰與網攻屬長期持續態勢；2026/07 未見明顯激增。
indicators.note_en: Cyber and influence operations against Taiwan continue at a chronic baseline; no clear surge observed as of July 2026.
queries: cyberattack surge Taiwan government infrastructure
Taiwan disinformation influence operations spike
台灣 網攻 認知作戰 激增

indicators.note_zh: 2026/07 官媒未見轉向「不得不戰」之戰爭動員敘事。
indicators.note_en: No shift in Chinese state media toward war-mobilization rhetoric as of July 2026.
queries: Chinese state media rhetoric war Taiwan escalation
People's Daily Global Times Taiwan war language
官媒 武統 輿論 動員
